name: Teleoperate Robot Arm to Target Joint Configuration
description: CoppeliaSim is running with the movementViaRemoteApi scene containing 3 robot arms (red, green, blue - each 7-DOF). Write a Python script using the ZMQ Remote API to teleoperate the BLUE robot arm to a specific joint configuration. Open a terminal and write a script that: 1) Connects to CoppeliaSim via RemoteAPIClient, 2) Gets the 7 joint handles for '/blueRobot/joint' (index 0-6), 3) Starts the simulation in stepping mode (sim.setStepping(True)), 4) Moves all 7 joints to target positions [90, 45, 170, -90, 45, 90, 0] degrees using sim.moveToConfig(), 5) Verifies the final joint positions match the targets (within 5 degrees), 6) Saves the scene as '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/scenes/robot_positioned.ttt'. The API client is at '/opt/CoppeliaSim/programming/zmqRemoteApi/clients/python/src'. You must start the simulation before moving joints. Observe the robot's movement via screenshots to confirm it reached the target pose.
